title: Genie Code Agent mode is now available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled
body:
Genie Code Agent mode is now available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled and **HIPAA**, **PCI-DSS**, and **FedRAMP Moderate** controls selected.

With Agent mode, Genie Code can automate multiple steps from a single prompt, including retrieving relevant assets, generating and running code, fixing errors automatically, and visualizing results.

See [Genie Code](/aws/en/genie-code).
